case_title: SEAN ALLABAND VS. STARTUPPERZ INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLABAND, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT STARTUPPERZ INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
